files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Byte-compiled / cache files
+__pycache__/
+*.py[cod]
+*$py.class
+
+# Distribution / packaging artifacts
+build/
+dist/
+*.egg-info/
+.eggs/
+*.egg
+
+# Virtual environments
+.venv/
+.env/
+.envrc
+
+# Tool caches and reports
+.pytest_cache/
+.mypy_cache/
+.ruff_cache/
+.coverage
+coverage.xml
+htmlcov/
+
+# Editors and workspace metadata
+.DS_Store
+.idea/
+.vscode/
